Declares the function `flash_erase_init` for initializing flash memory erasure.

# Purpose
This is a C header file that declares a single function prototype, [`flash_erase_init`](<#flash_erase_init>). The function is intended to initialize the process of erasing flash memory. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
